days.forecast:
The long-range backdrop holds steady — Jupiter in Leo, Saturn in Aries, Uranus in Gemini, Neptune in Aries, and Pluto retrograde in Aquarius set the season's tone.
Today the Sun is in Cancer, and the Moon is Full in Capricorn. Mercury is retrograde in Cancer, Venus is in Leo, and Mars is in Gemini.
The tightest thread in the sky is Neptune sextile Pluto, with Uranus sextile Neptune close behind.
So, with a Full Moon in Capricorn while Mercury is retrograde in Cancer, here's what to expect —
Truth is rising to the surface today, pulling everything out of the shadows and into the light. You may find yourself revisiting old conversations or unfinished plans as you decide what is truly worth keeping and what is ready to be released. Watch for a sudden breakthrough or a crack in your current structure; it is simply letting new air into your life. Whether you are focusing on deepening intimacy or refining your professional direction, move with the intention of a fresh start. Trust the spark of potential waiting within you. Step forward with courage.

The long-range backdrop holds steady — Jupiter in Leo, Saturn in Aries, Uranus in Gemini, Neptune in Aries, and Pluto retrograde in Aquarius set the season's tone.
Today the Sun is in Cancer, and the Moon is Waning Gibbous in Aquarius. Mercury is retrograde in Cancer, Venus is in Leo, and Mars is in Gemini.
The tightest thread in the sky is Neptune sextile Pluto, with Uranus sextile Neptune close behind.
So, with a Waning Gibbous in Aquarius while Mercury is retrograde in Cancer, here's what to expect —
You may feel a sudden crack in the old structures of your life, a disruption that serves as a necessary liberation to let new air into your spirit. As you review unfinished conversations and reconsider your plans, use this time to clear space for what truly matters. You are being asked to balance your drive for direction with a deep need for recovery; listen to your body’s limits so you do not burn out before the breakthrough arrives. Whether in intimacy or career, choose what aligns with your highest purpose and release the rest. Trust the transformation unfolding beneath the surface. Move with intention.
